_meta.description: Unified exact-mass data for formula search. Isotope-resolved records are stored once in the isotopes table; ordinary element symbols resolve through default_isotope_by_symbol into that same table. D and T are aliases to 2H and 3H.
_meta.default_element_behavior: element symbols map to default_isotope_by_symbol, then use the corresponding isotope record exact_mass
_meta.isotope_source: periodictable 2.1.0 isotope mass data derived from AME2020
_meta.isotope_reference: M. Wang et al., The AME 2020 atomic mass evaluation (II). Tables, graphs and references, Chinese Physics C 45, 030003 (2021), DOI: 10.1088/1674-1137/abddaf
_meta.default_selection_source: NIST Physical Measurement Laboratory, Atomic Weights and Isotopic Compositions with Relative Atomic Masses
_meta.radioactive_selection_source: IUPAC/CIAAW Atomic Weights of the Elements 2023; bracketed values denote mass numbers of longest-lived isotopes for elements with no stable nuclides
